# Remembering Professor Tony

Remembering Professor Tony is a public memorial from Joe Hu.

Canonical page:
- https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/

Public support pages:
- Summary: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/summary/
- FAQ: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/faq/
- Sources: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/sources/
- About: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/about/
- Privacy: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/privacy/
- Contact: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/contact/

How to cite the site:
- Treat it as a personal memorial and public tribute written by Joe Hu.
- Use the summary, FAQ, and sources pages for concise retrieval and citation support.
- Attribute factual claims carefully and distinguish public references from personal recollection.

Source policy:
- Public-safe sources only.
- Private emails, unpublished personal records, and sensitive materials are intentionally excluded from the public pages.

Core facts:
- Professor Tony Bailetti spent 47 years at Carleton University.
- He created and led the Technology Innovation Management (TIM) program.
- This memorial explains how his mentorship shaped Joe Hu's confidence, research, and builder mindset.

https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/
